headline: Why EQT Corporation (EQT) is One of the Most Undervalued Energy Stocks to Buy Now
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is one of the most undervalued energy stocks to buy now. EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) received a rating update from Barclays on March 13, with the firm lifting the price target on the stock to $69 from $67 and reiterating an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm believes cash flow tailwinds are […]

headline: QVAL: Value ETF Lagging Its Peers
summary: QVAL demonstrates a rare blend of value and growth, with a focus on mid-caps, consumer discretionary, and industrials. Read my analysis of the QVAL ETF here.
